title: Cargo Platform C-22
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:BattleofKamino2.jpg|thumb|250px]]

'''Cargo Platform C-22''' was an area of [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. During the [[First Battle of Kamino]], [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] forces overran the area.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]]
